headline: Thermo Fisher Launches TacroType Test As Shares Trade Below Targets
summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (NYSE:TMO) launched its TacroType Pharmacogenetic Test for transplant patients. The test is designed to support more personalized tacrolimus dosing based on a patient's genetic profile. The product targets transplant centers and clinicians involved in post transplant medication management. Thermo Fisher Scientific, traded as NYSE:TMO, is a large player in life sciences tools and diagnostics, supplying instruments, tests and services across research and clinical...

headline: AIM ImmunoTech Signs Agreement for Planning of a Proposed Phase 3 Clinical Trial of Ampligen in the Treatment of Late-Stage Pancreatic Cancer
summary: OCALA, Fla., March 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- AIM ImmunoTech Inc. (NYSE American: AIM) (“AIM” or the “Company”) today announced an agreement with the PPD™ clinical research business of Thermo Fisher Scientific to design AIM’s anticipated Phase 3 clinical trial in the use of the Company’s drug Ampligen in the treatment of late-stage pancreatic cancer. headline: Thermo Fisher Scientific Launches New Color-Based (Chromogenic) Culture Media to Help Detect Candida Infections Faster*, Including Drug-Resistant Candida auris
summary: WALTHAM, Mass., March 02, 2026--Thermo Fisher Scientific, the world leader in serving science, today announced the launch of Thermo Scientific™ Brilliance™ Candida 2 Agar and Spectra™ Candida Agar**, new color-based (chromogenic) culture media to help laboratories quickly detect and differentiate clinically important Candida species — including Candida auris, a growing global antimicrobial resistance (AMR) threat1.

content.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Launches New Color-Based (Chromogenic) Culture Media to Help Detect Candida Infections Faster*, Including Drug-Resistant Candida auris
